CommunityApplications.Profile:
# YAHLP - Yet Another HomeLab Portal Templates
Unraid container templates for YAHLP (Yet Another HomeLab Portal), a comprehensive reverse proxy and unified media server dashboard.
## Features
- **4 Deployment Modes:** Private (Basic Auth), Public (Basic Auth), Public (Google OAuth), Public (Entra ID) - **17 Integrated Services:** Supports Radarr, Sonarr, Lidarr, Whisparr, Jellyfin, Plex, Emby, Tautulli, and more - **Multiple Dashboard Styles:** Classic, Modern, Sleek, and Minimal layouts - **Theme Support:** Dark and light theme toggle with persistent user preferences - **Torrent/Usenet Links:** Pre-configured sites with favicon caching - **Mobile Responsive:** Dedicated mobile-optimized layout - **Authentication Options:** None, Basic Auth, Google OAuth2, or Microsoft Entra ID - **Automatic HTTPS:** Let's Encrypt integration for public deployments - **Minimal Defaults:** All services disabled by default - users enable only what they need
## Templates Included
- **yahlp-private-basic.xml** - HTTP-only private mode with basic authentication - **yahlp-public-basic.xml** - HTTPS public mode with basic authentication - **yahlp-public-google.xml** - HTTPS public mode with Google OAuth2 - **yahlp-public-entra.xml** - HTTPS public mode with Microsoft Entra ID OAuth2
## Documentation
Full setup and configuration documentation is available in the main repository. Each template includes detailed comments and sensible defaults for most use cases.
## Support
For issues, feature requests, or questions, visit the main YAHLP repository on GitHub.
